body:
Title: CRA Form ON479 and Worksheet ON479 2025 Ontario credits.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5006-tc/5006-tc-25e.txt
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5006-tc/5006-tc-25e.pdf
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5006-d1/5006-d1-25e.txt
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5006-d1/5006-d1-25e.pdf

ON479 numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 0.25
Value: 5000
Value: 1500
Value: 35000
Value: 65000
Value: 0.05
Value: 3000
Value: 0.15
Value: 500.05
Value: 1666.82
Value: 3793
Value: 0.75
Value: 0.50
Value: 0.3333
Value: 375.03
Value: 958.41
Value: 0.30
Value: 400000
Value: 600000
Value: 200000
Value: 1.00

CRA Form ON479 2025 calculates Ontario refundable credits. Line 1 multiplies eligible fertility treatment medical expenses by 25% and caps the credit at $5,000. Line 2 takes the CARE tax credit from Schedule ON479-A. Lines 3 to 13 calculate the Ontario seniors care at home tax credit by multiplying medical expenses from ON428 line 58769 by 25%, capping the base at $1,500, adding taxpayer and spouse net income, allowing the full amount at family net income of $35,000 or less, giving zero above $65,000, and otherwise reducing the amount by 5% of family net income above $35,000. Line 14 caps eligible seniors public transit payments at $3,000 and multiplies by 15%. Line 17 multiplies Ontario focused flow-through share expenses by 5%.

Worksheet ON479 2025 line 16 calculates the Ontario political contribution tax credit. The thresholds are $500.05, $1,666.82, and $3,793. The rates are 75%, 50%, and 33.33%, base credits are $375.03 and $958.41, and the maximum credit is $1,666.82. Worksheet ON479 line 20 calculates the co-operative education tax credit. If prior-year salaries and wages were $400,000 or less the rate is 30%; if $600,000 or more the rate is 25%; between those amounts the worksheet uses 25% plus 5% times one minus the excess over $400,000 divided by $200,000. The credit is capped at $3,000 per student. ON479 line 21 adds line 18 and line 20 and enters Ontario credits on line 47900.
